entities.name: BACILLUS ALTITUDINIS SORB11
entities.description: A bacterial strain isolated from the Indian sector of the Southern Ocean at a depth of 3.8 km, characterized by its tolerance to UV radiation

entities.name: UV RADIATION
entities.description: Ultraviolet radiation acting as an environmental stressor to which the strain is tolerant

entities.name: UV RESISTANCE
entities.description: The biological ability of the organism to withstand or tolerate UV radiation

entities.name: INDIAN SECTOR OF THE SOUTHERN OCEAN
entities.description: The geographical region from which the Bacillus altitudinis SORB11 strain was isolated

entities.name: DRAFT GENOME SEQUENCE
entities.description: The process of sequencing the genome of B. altitudinis SORB11 to identify its resistance mechanisms

entities.name: COMPARATIVE STUDIES
entities.description: Research approach used to compare the genome of B. altitudinis SORB11 with other UV-resistant bacteria

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: General group of microorganisms that may exhibit resistance to UV radiation
